nasb.text: Now Bezalel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah, made all that the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: Bezalel the son of Uri, son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah, made all that the Lord commanded Moses;

cnv.text: 凡是耶和華吩咐摩西的，猶大支派戶珥的孫子、烏利的兒子比撒列都做了。

ccb.text: 犹大支派户珥的孙子、乌利的儿子比撒列做好了耶和华吩咐摩西预备的一切物品。
